# signoz_rule (Data Source)

Reads a single SigNoz alert rule by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "signoz_rule" "by_id" {
  id = signoz_rule.high_error_rate.id
}

output "rule_state" {
  value = data.signoz_rule.by_id.state
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) ID of the rule to look up.

### Read-Only

- `alert` (String) Rule name.
- `alert_type` (String) Alert family.
- `annotations` (Map of String) Rule annotations.
- `condition` (Attributes) Rule condition. Same shape as the resource attribute.
- `created_at` (String), `created_by` (String) Creation metadata.
- `description` (String) Description.
- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether the rule is disabled.
- `eval_window` (String), `frequency` (String) Legacy rolling-window settings.
- `evaluation` (Attributes) Evaluation strategy.
- `labels` (Map of String) Static labels.
- `notification_settings` (Attributes) Notification settings (read-back even if not Phase 2-supported on writes).
- `preferred_channels` (List of String) Routed channel names.
- `rule_type` (String) Rule kind.
- `schema_version` (String) Internal schema version.
- `source` (String) Optional source URL.
- `state` (String) Current alert state.
- `updated_at` (String), `updated_by` (String) Last-update metadata.
- `version` (String) Rule schema version.
